_comment: Named releases. A release is DECLARED here, by hand and deliberately, when there is something worth telling people about. It is not the same thing as a deployment: Daimond seals a build on every deploy, several a day, and every one of those is recorded in verify/transparency.jsonl, which is the security record and cannot be pruned. This file is the other thing -- what a user is told they are running. While `milestones` is empty the app says it is pre-release and names the build, so nothing is announced before it has been announced. Names are Western Australian places, in alphabetical order, so their sequence is legible without a lookup. `from` is the transparency sequence a release begins at.

planned.name: Albany
planned.blurb: The first release: a private AI workspace that runs in your browser, keeps your keys on your device, and can be checked against its own published source.
